exception_cards.trigger_signal: A platform account cannot establish a usable session because the configured login path fails before the report area can be reached.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Mark the platform account as blocked, preserve the failure context, and route the account to a human operator before any dependent collection work continues for that platform.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: A platform requests captcha, device confirmation, or another approval step that breaks unattended account entry.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Stop automated entry for the affected platform, notify the owner that a manual approval step is required, and resume downstream work only after a verified session is available.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The account signs in but lacks the permission needed to open the required backend area or report scope.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Do not continue collection for the affected platform. Record the missing permission scope and escalate to the account owner for access correction.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: A platform account cannot reach the daily report page because login fails, captcha appears, or device verification is required.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Mark the affected platform as blocked, notify a human operator, and continue other platforms only when platform-level isolation is allowed.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: A configured platform-store-date combination returns no data or misses a required metric.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Do not write an inferred value into the report. Add the item to the manual review list and keep source evidence.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The platform query succeeds but the expected data export or downloaded file is not produced in a usable way.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Retry within the step only when the same platform session remains valid; otherwise log the failed export attempt and send the item to manual follow-up with the query context preserved.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: A required source field for the report mapping is absent from the collected platform data.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Do not infer a replacement value. Record the missing field, hold the affected metric for review, and keep the original source payload for traceability.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The collected platform field definition does not align with the agreed report metric definition or target template meaning.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Stop normalization for the affected metric until a human confirms the correct mapping or business definition. Preserve both source and target field context.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: A mapped metric resolves to an empty value after normalization even though the report requires a populated result.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Flag the metric as incomplete, keep the empty-result evidence, and route it to manual review instead of writing a guessed value.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The Tencent Docs template cannot be opened, edited, or saved to the configured position.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Stop report delivery, notify a human operator, and preserve normalized data so it can be written manually or retried later.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The target Tencent Docs structure no longer matches the expected report layout or field arrangement.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Stop automated writeback, capture which report areas no longer align, and require a human to confirm or update the template mapping before resuming.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The target Tencent Docs file is reachable but the current run lacks edit permission for the required report area.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Do not attempt partial writeback. Record the permission gap and notify the owner so the write scope can be restored before delivery resumes.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: The preserved source totals or spot-check values do not match the values written into the report output.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Keep the report item in a review state, log both values, and require a human comparison before the run is treated as complete.

exception_cards.trigger_signal: A platform-store metric remains in the manual review queue beyond the agreed review window and the report cannot be signed off automatically.
exception_cards.handling_strategy: Escalate the unresolved review item to the owner, keep the evidence package attached, and prevent the run from being marked fully delivered.

global_exception_policies: Do not overwrite report values when source data is missing or mapping is uncertain.
Continue unaffected platforms only when each platform can be isolated in the report.
Preserve source value and written value evidence for every abnormal item.
